overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a cowboy character walking through a rainy historic Southern city resembling New Orleans. The character traverses muddy cobblestone streets lined with brick buildings, wrought iron balconies, and historic mansions, passing horse-drawn carriages under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk beside historic brick building with wrought iron balcony

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow wet sidewalk next to a red brick building with ornate wrought iron balcony

entered.detail: two-story red brick building with wrought iron balcony railing and stone window trim
wet muddy cobblestone street with puddles reflecting the gray overcast sky
tall wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and electrical wires
trees with white painted trunks lining the opposite side of the street
pointed roof tower with dark spire visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk beside a red brick building with wrought iron balconies. To the right lies a muddy cobblestone street lined with white-trunked trees under an overcast rainy sky, with a historic church tower visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy intersection with historic mansions and passing carriage traffic

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the wide muddy street
horse-drawn carriage with two horses passes from right to left across the character's path

agents.ego_description: turning right and crossing the muddy street toward a tree-lined area with large white mansions

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage being pulled by two horses moving left across the intersection

entered.detail: large white two-story mansion with tall Greek columns and wraparound porch
distinctive pink two-story house with black wrought iron balcony and green shutters
black carriage with red interior upholstery being pulled by two dark horses

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open muddy intersection, passing a moving horse-drawn carriage. A grand white columned mansion appears on the left while a distinctive pink house with wrought iron balconies comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with historic pink house and iron fence line

events.description: character slows slightly while navigating past the parked carriage and NPC on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing the pink house and continuing alongside the black iron fence

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt bending down near the wheels of the parked carriage

entered.detail: ornate black wrought iron fence with decorative stone pillars and gates
stationary black carriage with red interior parked on the muddy shoulder
tall palm trees with spreading fronds in front of the pink house

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the distinctive pink house with its black wrought iron balconies and palm trees, continuing along a black iron fence. A parked carriage with an NPC tending to it sits on the right side of the muddy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-canopied residential walkway with overhanging oak branches

events.description: approaching an intersection with a blooming pink tree visible through the canopy ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow path under the dense tree canopy toward the intersection

entered.detail: dense overhead canopy of live oak trees with hanging Spanish moss creating a tunnel effect
tree with bright pink blossoms visible at the upcoming street intersection
light-colored wooden house with dark shutters visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a dense canopy of oak trees with hanging moss that creates a sheltered, tunnel-like path. Approaching an intersection, a blooming magnolia tree with pink flowers becomes visible ahead, while the iron fence continues along the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy historic district that transitions from open cobblestone streets to a sheltered, wooded canopy. It begins beside a red brick building with wrought iron balconies, moving along a muddy street lined with white-trunked trees toward a distant church tower. As the character crosses an open intersection and passes a moving horse-drawn carriage, the scenery shifts to reveal a grand white columned mansion and a distinctive pink house. The camera then continues past the pink house and a parked carriage, following a black iron fence that guides the path forward. Finally, the open street gives way to a dense tunnel of oak trees with hanging moss, leading toward a blooming magnolia tree with pink flowers.
